competitors.name: zod
competitors.source:
c(z.object({
      id: z.number(),
      email: z.string(),
      name: z.string(),
      age: z.number().optional(),
      roles: z.array(z.enum(['admin', 'editor', 'user'])),
      active: z.boolean(),
      createdAt: z.string(),
    }))

competitors.name: typebox
competitors.source:
c(
    Type.Object({
      id: Type.Number(),
      email: Type.String(),
      name: Type.String(),
      age: Type.Optional(Type.Number()),
      roles: Type.Array(Type.Union([Type.Literal('admin'), Type.Literal('editor'), Type.Literal('user')])),
      active: Type.Boolean(),
      createdAt: Type.String(),
    })
  )

competitors.name: ajv
